title: HoHitDelay
description: This plugin convert modern pvp to 1.8.I special design this plugin for bedwars.
body:
![‎](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e04e358db4215342db7a748524556f149d4ae28e.png)This is a simple plugin which is design to convert modern pvp to 1.8 this could a woudfull plugin if you are going to have bedwars on your server.
Thanks for all of your support 💖
**It remove the time you need to wait befour hit again it is use for bedwars because most bedwar plugin come on 1.20 or lower it will make all verson of minecraft like 1.8**
